response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has strong full-stack and distributed systems experience, particularly in fintech-adjacent environments (e.g., Stripe, Shopify). However, his background lacks explicit leadership of multi-agent AI systems in production or scaling engineering teams to 30+ people. His open-source work and tooling contributions show technical depth, but the role's executive and agentic-AI requirements are not fully met.
strengths: Extensive experience in high-scale distributed systems and backend engineering (e.g., Stripe, Shopify, Sociomantic).
Proven contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators at Stripe) and event-driven architectures.
Strong open-source portfolio demonstrating technical depth in tooling, observability, and real-time systems.
concerns: No explicit track record of designing or leading multi-agent AI systems in production (only tangential tooling contributions).
Limited evidence of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or developing senior technical leadership.
Fintech experience is indirect (e.g., Stripe payments, Shopify pricing) rather than core infrastructure (credit risk, liquidity optimization).
